title: Computational protocol to identify shared transcriptional risks and compounds between diseases
author: Gao, Zhang, et al.
materials: Affymetrix Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Array

steps.title: Before you begin
steps.instruction: The protocol below describes the specific steps used to identify the shared transcriptional risks between cancer and atherosclerosis using The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) datasets for the various cancer subtypes and the Stockholm-Tartu Atherosclerosis Reverse Network Engineering Task (STARNET) and Biobank of Karolinska Endarterectomy (BiKE) atherosclerosis datasets. However, the protocol is adaptable to any analogous datasets from which summary statistics of transcriptional risks can be derived.

steps.title: Before you begin
steps.instruction: This section includes recommendations for the hardware specifications, and instructions for the pipeline localization, the computing environment setup, and some restricted resources downloading.
